title: Mesembryanthemum exile
taxonomy: Mesembryanthemum exile is classified within the family Aizoaceae, commonly known as the ice plant family. This classification is based on its morphological characteristics and genetic relationships with other members of the Aizoaceae. Aizoaceae is a family of succulent plants that are primarily found in southern Africa. Mesembryanthemum exile is a part of the genus Mesembryanthemum, which consists of various species of succulent plants. The classification of Mesembryanthemum exile provides insight into its evolutionary history and its position within the broader plant kingdom.

intro: Mesembryanthemum exile, also known as the Ice Plant, is a succulent plant species belonging to the Aizoaceae family, characterized by its unique ability to store water in its leaves, allowing it to thrive in arid environments.
